auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your PlanMed system

cpr.ugyldigDato: CPR number contains no valid date of birth
cpr.modulus11: CPR number fails modulus-11 check — verify for typos
cpr.warningHint: You can still save if you are certain the CPR number is correct.

ownerSetup.title: Welcome — Set up owner account
ownerSetup.intro: This is the first start. Create an owner account to administer the system. The code is stored as a bcrypt hash in the browser.
ownerSetup.ownerCode: Owner code (min 12 chars, upper + lower + digit)
ownerSetup.warning: The code is stored as a bcrypt hash in localStorage (saltRounds=10). The hash cannot be reversed, but note that the browser's localStorage is accessible to XSS attacks — require HTTPS and CSP in production.
ownerSetup.changeCodeLabel: Change owner code (min 12 chars, upper + lower + digit)
ownerSetup.errCodeShort: Owner code must be at least 12 characters
ownerSetup.errCodeComplexity: Owner code must contain at least one letter and one digit

val.tooShort: Code must be at least 12 characters
val.noLower: Code must contain at least one lowercase letter
val.noUpper: Code must contain at least one uppercase letter
val.noDigit: Code must contain at least one digit
val.common: This code is on the list of most common passwords — choose something more unique

dept.setupCompany: Setting up {{selskab}} — create your first department

kapacitet.title: Capacity analysis
kapacitet.subtitle: See whether pending tasks can be scheduled within a given period — and what's missing if not.
kapacitet.maxTimerLabel: Max weekly hours per staff member
kapacitet.maxTimerHint: Empty = use each staff member's configured hours.
kapacitet.working: Analyzing — running hypothesis simulations for each resource.
kapacitet.fejletBesked: {{antal}} task(s) cannot be scheduled within the period with current resources.
kapacitet.flaskehalseIntro: Resources sorted by how many additional tasks could be scheduled with more capacity.
kapacitet.manglerOpgaver: {{antal}} task(s) depend on this resource ({{pct}}% of total).
kapacitet.scenarierIntro: Sorted by monthly cost — cheapest first.
